mapper.sql: id, parent_id as "parentId", dept_code as "deptCode", dept_name as "deptName", sort_order as "sortOrder", leader, phone, status, remark, create_by as "createBy", create_time as "createTime", update_by as "updateBy", update_time as "updateTime"

id, parent_id as "parentId", menu_name as "menuName", path, component, icon, sort_order as "sortOrder", status, permission_code as "permissionCode", remark, create_by as "createBy", create_time as "createTime", update_by as "updateBy", update_time as "updateTime"

id, menu_id as "menuId", resource_name as "resourceName", resource_code as "resourceCode", method, path, resource_type as "resourceType", match_type as "matchType", priority, status, remark, create_by as "createBy", create_time as "createTime", update_by as "updateBy", update_time as "updateTime"
mapper.select: select distinct r.resource_code from sys_user_role ur join sys_role_resource rr on rr.role_id = ur.role_id join sys_resource r on r.id = rr.resource_id join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id and role.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and rr.status = 1 and r.status = 1
select resource_code from sys_resource where status = 1 order by resource_code asc

select distinct rm.menu_id from sys_user_role ur join sys_role_menu rm on rm.role_id = ur.role_id join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id and role.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and rm.status = 1
select id from sys_menu where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, create_time asc

select distinct ra.agent_id from sys_user_role ur join sys_role_agent ra on ra.role_id = ur.role_id join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id and role.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and ra.status = 1
select id from agent where status = 1 order by agent_code asc

select coalesce( ( select ur.data_scope from sys_user_role ur join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id and role.status = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 order by case ur.data_scope when 'ALL' then 4 when 'DEPT_AND_SUB' then 3 when 'DEPT' then 2 else 1 end desc limit 1 ), 'SELF' )
select resource_code from sys_resource where status = 1 and method = #{method} and path = #{path} and match_type = 'EXACT' limit 1

select id, resource_code as "resourceCode", path, match_type as "matchType", priority from sys_resource where status = 1 and method = #{method} and match_type = 'ANT' order by priority desc, create_time asc
select exists( select 1 from sys_user_role ur join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and role.status = 1 and role.role_type = 'SUPER_ADMIN' )
select user_id from sys_user_role where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
select from sys_department where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, create_time asc
select from sys_menu where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, create_time asc

select distinct m.id, m.parent_id as "parentId", m.menu_name as "menuName", m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.sort_order as "sortOrder", m.status, m.permission_code as "permissionCode", m.remark, m.create_by as "createBy", m.create_time as "createTime", m.update_by as "updateBy", m.update_time as "updateTime" from sys_menu m join sys_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.id join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rm.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and rm.status = 1 and m.status = 1 order by m.sort_order asc
select from sys_resource where status = 1 order by resource_code asc

select id, role_code as "roleCode", role_name as "roleName", role_type as "roleType", status, sort_order as "sortOrder", remark, create_by as "createBy", create_time as "createTime", update_by as "updateBy", update_time as "updateTime" from sys_role where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, create_time asc

select u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.department_id as "departmentId", d.dept_name as "departmentName", u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.remark, coalesce(( select ur.data_scope from sys_user_role ur join sys_role role on role.id = ur.role_id and role.status = 1 where ur.user_id = u.id and ur.status = 1 order by case ur.data_scope when 'ALL' then 4 when 'DEPT_AND_SUB' then 3 when 'DEPT' then 2 else 1 end desc limit 1 ), 'SELF') as "dataScope", u.last_login_time as "lastLoginTime", u.last_login_ip as "lastLoginIp", u.create_by as "createBy", u.create_time as "createTime", u.update_by as "updateBy", u.update_time as "updateTime" from sys_user u left join sys_department d on d.id = u.department_id where u.status = 1 order by u.create_time asc

select id, agent_code as "agentCode", agent_name as "agentName", description, permission_level as "permissionLevel", icon, status, remark, create_by as "createBy", create_time as "createTime", update_by as "updateBy", update_time as "updateTime" from agent where status = 1 order by create_time asc

select distinct a.id, a.agent_code as "agentCode", a.agent_name as "agentName", a.description, a.permission_level as "permissionLevel", a.icon, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by as "createBy", a.create_time as "createTime", a.update_by as "updateBy", a.update_time as "updateTime" from agent a join sys_role_agent ra on ra.agent_id = a.id join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = ra.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and ra.status = 1 and a.status = 1 order by a.create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_department ( id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, sort_order, status, leader, phone, remark, create_by, update_by ) values ( #{id}, #{body.parentId}, #{body.deptCode}, #{body.deptName}, #{body.sortOrder}, #{body.status}, #{body.leader}, #{body.phone}, #{body.remark}, #{body.createBy}, #{body.createBy} )

insert into sys_role (id, role_code, role_name, role_type, status, sort_order, remark, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{body.roleCode}, #{body.roleName}, #{body.roleType}, #{body.status}, #{body.sortOrder}, #{body.remark}, #{body.createBy}, #{body.createBy})
mapper.update: update sys_department set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update sys_menu set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update sys_resource set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update sys_role set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update sys_user set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update agent set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where id = #{id}
update sys_user_role set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_role (id, user_id, role_id, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createBy}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select role_id from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1
mapper.update: update sys_role_menu set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_menu (id, role_id, menu_id, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{menuId}, #{createBy}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
mapper.update: update sys_role_resource set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_resource (id, role_id, resource_id, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{resourceId}, #{createBy}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select resource_id from sys_role_resource where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
mapper.update: update sys_role_agent set status = 2, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_agent (id, role_id, agent_id, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{roleId}, #{agentId}, #{createBy}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select agent_id from sys_role_agent where role_id = #{roleId} and status = 1
select id from sys_user where department_id = #{departmentId} and status = 1
select id from sys_user where status = 1
